channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace

item.title: KubeDiagrams - Sun Jun 21 17:33:40 UTC 2026
item.description:
Diagramming for Kubernetes in JetBrains IDEs based on KubeDiagrams output.
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.jetbrains.kubeblick

item.title: C/C++ Language Support via Classic Engine - Thu Jun 18 15:48:12 UTC 2026
item.description:
The plugin adds C/C++ Language Support via Classic Engine.
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.intellij.cidr.lang
